about.title: Mahkota Taiwan
about.description: Mahkota Taiwan is Taiwan's leading Indonesian food distributor, proudly bridging Indonesian culture and Taiwanese daily life since 2021. With over 26 carefully curated product lines — spanning instant food, snacks, cooking spices, beverages, and household essentials — we serve more than 1 million customers through 300+ partner stores across the island. All our products are Halal certified, ensuring the highest standards of quality and trust. Backed by a reliable supply chain and comprehensive logistics network, Mahkota Taiwan is more than just a distributor — we are a cultural ambassador, bringing the authentic taste of home to every Indonesian community in Taiwan.
about.mission: Our mission is to bridge cultures through food, providing high-quality Indonesian products with reliable distribution across Taiwan.

faq1.question: How can I order Mahkota Taiwan products?
faq1.answer: You can order our products through any of our 300+ partner stores across Taiwan. Check our store locator to find the nearest location, or contact us directly for bulk orders.

faq2.question: Do you offer delivery services?
faq2.answer: Yes! We offer delivery services for bulk and wholesale orders. For individual purchases, please visit any of our partner stores. Contact our team for delivery schedules and minimum order quantities.

faq3.question: How can I become a retail partner?
faq3.answer: We're always looking for new retail partners! Please send us an email at mahkotataiwan@gmail.com or call us at +886-2-26099118 with your store details, and our partnership team will get back to you within 2 business days.

faq4.question: What types of products do you distribute?
faq4.answer: We distribute a wide range of authentic Indonesian products including instant noodles, seasonings, sauces, beverages, snacks, cooking essentials, and household items. We carry 26+ carefully selected product lines.

faq5.question: Can I request a specific Indonesian product?
faq5.answer: Absolutely! We welcome product suggestions from our community. Please reach out via email or our social media channels with the product details, and we'll do our best to source it for you.
